misc.title: Voice actress Wakana Yamazaki passed away at the age of 61. She is best known for her role as Ran Mouri in Detective Conan. Yamazaki also voiced Dead or Alive's Ayame, Warriors' Nene and Okuni, One Pi
misc.text: Voice actress Wakana Yamazaki passed away at the age of 61. She is best known for her role as Ran Mouri in Detective Conan. Yamazaki also voiced Dead or Alive's Ayame, Warriors' Nene and Okuni, One Piece's Nojiko, Digimon's Archnemon, Never7's Saki, and many more. ytv.co.jp/conan/pdf/conan_05…

misc.text: #ONEPIECE1182 Crazy that Loki still didn´t used his hybrid form which ragdolled HK Harald. I feel it will be a big deal once Oda show the hybrid form of Loki. Question will be when Oda reveal it? Before Luffy join the battle or after?

misc.text: #ONEPIECE My guess for Luffy power ups in the next arcs: - Better G5 control in general(Elbaph), I don´t think he gets a major powerup this arc - New haki skill/Voice of all things against Teach in the next arc - Final Gear(true Nika power, fire ring) vs Imu in the final arc.
